privileged_info_summary: The CT Cranium DICOM dataset (0051) is real, non-synthetic data sourced from the official InVesalius 3 v3.0 GitHub releases. The dataset contains 108 DICOM slices with 512x512 pixel dimensions. The expected dimensions metadata bounds [200-600 x 200-600 x 50-200] correctly encompass the actual 512x512x108 volume. The output path /home/ga/Documents/bone_mask.nii.gz is the correct target location. The Bone threshold preset (226-3071 HU) follows InVesalius official specifications.
